name: Switch Point
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>点</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Choose 1 monster your opponent controls, and your opponent sends either of the following to the GY.
● The chosen monster.
● The other monsters they control.
Your opponent must control 3 or more monsters for you to activate and resolve this effect.
eff:
Choose 1 monster your opponent controls, and your opponent sends either of the following to the GY.
● The chosen monster.
● The other monsters they control.
Your opponent must control 3 or more monsters for you to activate and resolve this effect.

action: Makes your opponent send from the field to the Graveyard
